verifier_notes: The existing extractor recipe and the verifier's tick_center / axis_line predicates assume linear axes. On log y, the y tick label centres sit at EQUAL pixel spacing (because the labels are 0.1, 1, 10, 100, 1000) but the values they represent are NOT equally spaced. A linear calibration fit through (pixel, value) pairs misreads the axis by ~30-100 % per tick. This is the harness's first real stress test.
